ops.title: Stale-zero grep papercut fixed (rg recheck of tilth zeros + semble>=0.5 floor); uvx-vs-installed version-skew trap; tilth zeros come from blind spots more than time-staleness
ops.body:
Shipped 2026-07-13 on main (`96fcca7f` semble, `bf294587` grep): the stale-index papercut fix.

- **Grep lane**: every tilth zero (clean `â€” 0 matches` header AND the `not found:` path-fallback) is re-verified through `ripgrep.RunFound` on both surfaces (`internal/grep/grep.go` Run, `internal/proxy/proxy.go` call â€” the proxy hook also covers codeexec). The live result wins only when structurally found (parsed engine events, never string-sniffing the finalized output â€” capped output can truncate/spoof headers); genuine zeros stay byte-identical. Recheck failures degrade to the original answer unless `ctx.Err() != nil`, which propagates wrapped ctx.Err.
- **Tilth zeros are mostly blind spots, not time-staleness**: the resident tilth MCP session re-indexes edits in ~0.07s even in 3000-file repos; deterministic stale zeros come from files tilth won't index (multi-MB, minified single-line). The recheck rescues both classes.
- **Version-skew trap (cost a full rework)**: the semble fix was designed against `~/.local/share/uv/tools/semble` (0.4.0, had a positional-path watcher mode) but `uvx --from` resolves published PyPI latest (0.5.0, positional REMOVED â€” launch dies on `unrecognized arguments`). When designing against a uvx-launched tool, read the version uvx actually resolves (`uvx --from X python -c "import importlib.metadata as m; print(m.version('X'))"`), not the installed tool's source. Semble details live in the cc-notes doc "semble[mcp]>=0.5 floor" (internal/backend).
- `translateGlob` now fails fast on dot-leading/empty basename globs (grep fallback's unconditional `--exclude-dir=.[!./]*` makes them silently wrong otherwise); `grepArgv` gained the `AnchorGrepArgs` peel for rg parity.
- A stale local jj bookmark (`fix/web-gaps`) made `ccx vcs ship` push the wrong branch â†’ `CI no-run` (CI triggers on main only); fixed by `jj rebase -d main`, `jj bookmark set main`, `jj bookmark forget <stale>`, manual push + `gh run watch`. Check `jj log` bookmarks before shipping when the repo has leftover branch bookmarks.

Related: [[ccx-grep-engine-guard-rewrites]], [[uvx-exclude-newer-fresh-release]], [[cc-context-architecture]]
